metadata.description: pencilpusher — The AI bureaucrat that fills forms so you don't have to. Ships one skill for filling AcroForm PDFs, DOCX with SDT content controls and tables, and dense flat-PDF supplier questionnaires from a persistent user-wide knowledge vault.

plugins.name: pencilpusher
plugins.description: Fill structured forms (AcroForm PDFs, DOCX SDTs / tables / placeholders, dense flat-PDF questionnaires) from a user-wide knowledge vault. Agent-driven commands make zero Anthropic API calls — the calling agent does the reasoning; pencilpusher does deterministic document manipulation.
